name: neurodiverse-claude-skills
description: Claude skills built around cognitive friction points — voice input, task breakdown, communication, and cognitive load. Built by a neurodivergent person for personal use, shared openly.

plugins.name: voice-input-processor
plugins.description: Interprets messy, unstructured voice-to-text input, finds the intent, and reformats it for use

plugins.name: brain-dump-organiser
plugins.description: Takes everything on your mind and organises it into clear themes and structure with optional next steps

plugins.name: digest-this
plugins.description: Digests any long, dense, or complex content into a short, low cognitive load summary. Activates automatically when long content is shared.
